title: fagraea curtisii
intro: Fagraea curtisii, also known as the Bunga Raya, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Singapore. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fagraea curtisii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting healing, thanks to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture by herbalists, who use it to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
